description_long: This is a Mikasa FT-5 football, featuring a distinctive black and white panel design with pentagonal and hexagonal shapes. The surface shows visible scuff marks and signs of use, with some areas appearing more worn and discolored than others. The branding 'Mikasa' and 'FT-5' are clearly printed on one of the panels, along with a small gold figure and a FIFA logo, indicating its use in official matches or training. The ball's panels are separated by visible seams, suggesting a stitched construction, and the surface has a slightly matte, grippy finish. The overall shape is spherical, and the ball appears to be inflated, maintaining a firm and rounded form. The material is likely synthetic leather with an inner rubber bladder, typical for high-quality footballs.
description: A Mikasa FT-5 football with a black and white stitched panel design, visible branding, and signs of moderate wear.
description_view_0: This view highlights the Mikasa branding, FT-5 model text, and a gold figure, with visible scuffing and panel seams.
description_view_1: This view shows the top of the ball, focusing on the geometric panel pattern with less visible branding and more uniform wear.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the alternating black and white panels, with moderate surface wear and no visible logos.
description_view_3: This view displays the Mikasa logo, FT-5 text, FIFA logo, and gold figure, with pronounced panel seams and surface scuffs.
